modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be a few minor typos and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need info on getting around Vermillion.

full_description_text:  
I'm trying to figure out how to get around Vermillion. What are the transportation options available? I just need some quick info on this, so I can plan my day better.
short_description: Need info on getting around Vermillion.
description: I'm trying to figure out how to get around Vermillion. What are the transportation options available? I just need some quick info on this, so I can plan my day better.
